ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., specification, design, code comment) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path where the document is stored */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the author */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "document_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first document in the comparison */,
  "document_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second document in the comparison */,
  "comparison_method" TEXT /* Method used for comparison (e.g., Jaccard, Manhattan) */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Score indicating similarity between the documents */,
  "average_time" REAL /* Average time taken for the comparison */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comparison (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the comparison */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the comparison */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comparison was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_comparison_method FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_method") REFERENCES comparison_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_document_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("document_id_2") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_document_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("document_id_1") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the comparison method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the comparison method */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the comparison method */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the comparison method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated comparison */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., similarity score, average time) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the standardized metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was generated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Developer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated comparison */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comparison was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the comparison */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comparison (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the comparison */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_history_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Jaccard Score) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, seconds) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comparison during which the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was logged */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the error */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the error */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
